title: Banana Hanger Hook – Space Saving Banana Holder Hanger to Keep Bananas Fresh, Self Adhesive and Screw Banana Hook 1Pack Black
seller_info_text: Dongguan Jiayuhao Hardware Products Co., Ltd
features: Space-Saving Design: This folding banana holder features a practical, space-saving hook that folds away when not in use. Simply fold it up to keep your kitchen tidy and organized, saving valuable countertop space.

Effortless Installation: No tools required! The hook attaches easily with a powerful self-adhesive backing. Installation is quick and hassle-free, so you can start using your banana holder in seconds.Or screw installation

Durable and Strong: Designed to hold up to 15 lbs of bananas, this hook uses ultra-strong adhesive to keep it securely in place. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting performance, even with heavy use.
Preserve Banana Freshness: Hanging bananas helps them ripen evenly, reducing bruising and preventing mushiness. This innovative design helps maintain banana freshness for longer periods.

Multi-Functional and Versatile: Not just for bananas! This hook can be used for other lightweight items like towels, keys, coffee mugs, or even pans and pots. A practical addition to any kitchen, bathroom, or entryway.
description: From the brand BANANA HANGER HOOK Hang it in the kitchen for instant neatness. It's the epitome of practical aesthetics, adding convenience to life. Previous page Next page
